meta.title: Alea Farrel | Computer and Network Engineer
meta.description: Portfolio of Alea Farrel, a Computer and Network Engineer exploring high-performance web applications, scripting, lower-level systems, and modern digital experiences.

hero.name: Alea Farrel
hero.title: Computer and Network Engineer
hero.subtitle: Crafting immersive digital experiences at the intersection of design and technology.

about.heading: Passionate about technology and continuous learning.
about.bio_1: I'm a developer passionate about crafting interactive digital experiences. I enjoy exploring various technical domains, from high-performance web applications to scripting and lower-level systems.
about.bio_2: Always eager to learn, I spend my time exploring emerging technologies and collaborating on innovative solutions.

projects.subheading: A curated selection of projects that represent my passion for building things that matter.

items.name: Rapid Texter GUI
items.description: Modern typing speed test with stunning GUI interface. Test your finger speed and mental accuracy.

items.description: Terminal-based typing trainer with real-time feedback directly from the terminal.

items.name: Enigmorph
items.description: A modern portable Enigma-style encryption application with password and PIN-based shifting.

items.name: Alea AirCursor
items.description: A gesture-based cursor controller, designed for vision-based interaction.

items.name: Alea's Intelligence
items.description: AI Chat Web-UI with Speech-to-Text powered by Whisper AI and support OpenRouter/Groq API integration.

items.name: TKJ Inventory
items.description: The inventory management system for SMKN 1 Seyegan's Computer Network Engineering program.

items.name: Portofolio
items.description: Portofolio website for showcasing projects and achievements.

items.name: Satu Ramadhan
items.description: A Hybrid app for Islamic prayer times based on user location via GPS and manual location input. Available on Play Store.

items.name: MTCNA
items.title: MikroTik Certified Network Associate

items.name: MTCTCE
items.title: MikroTik Certified Traffic Control Engineer
items.description: Acquired advanced expertise in traffic control, implementing complex Quality of Service (QoS) and precise bandwidth management solutions.

items.name: Cluster Training 2
items.title: Computer Network Device Configuration
items.description: Proven ability to configure, troubleshoot, and optimize diverse computer network devices for reliable connectivity.

items.name: Cluster Training 3

items.description: Specialized in advanced routing protocols and complex network device configurations for enterprise environments.

items.name: OJM Finalist
